pr.title: RHAIENG-5016: Pull requests to branches other than main need to have branch name at the beginning of title, e.g. [rhoai-2.22]
pr.body:
Renovate PRs to release branches (e.g. rhoai-2.22) were missing the
required [branch-name] prefix in their titles. This adds a packageRule
with commitMessagePrefix using the baseBranch template variable, scoped
to non-main branches via matchBaseBranches, so PR titles now start with
e.g. [rhoai-2.22].

Closes [RHAIENG-5016](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHAIENG-5016)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Jiri Danek <jdanek@redhat.com>

[RHAIENG-5016]: https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHAIENG-5016?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiNWRkNTljNzYxNjVmNDY3MDlhMDU5Y2ZhYzA5YTRkZjUiLCJwIjoiZ2l0aHViLWNvbS1KU1cifQ
